seoTitle: Mundrabilla vs Munglinup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mundrabilla and Munglinup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mundrabilla and Munglinup.
heading: Mundrabilla vs Munglinup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mundrabilla, Western Australia and Munglinup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Munglinup has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Mundrabilla (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mundrabilla or Munglinup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mundrabilla has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Munglinup scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mundrabilla scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Munglinup scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mundrabilla or Munglinup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Munglinup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
